_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox beat Yankees 5-3, end six-game losing streak to rivals
items.snark: Sonny Gray finally beat the Yankees in the Bronx and didn't even surrender his usual eight runs doing it.

items.headline: Red Sox at Yankees preview: Sonny Gray gets the ball in Bronx
items.snark: Last place Sox, 10.5 back, facing the Yanks without Judge feels like showing up to a knife fight with a spork.

items.headline: Red Sox at Yankees preview: Gray returns to his personal house of horrors
items.snark: Gray has a 6.06 ERA at Yankee Stadium and said he hates the Yankees, so this should go great.

items.headline: Sox drop series finale 8-2 to Orioles, now 10-21 at Fenway Park
items.snark: Red Sox home record is the worst in baseball and somehow still not the most embarrassing thing happening at Fenway.

items.headline: Patriots Mailbag: How concerning is A.J. Brown's injury history?
items.snark: Everyone asking if Brown's hammies and knees will hold up like we didn't just mortgage 2028 to find out.
